message:
Add Playwright test dependency and sync lockfile

package.json:
- Added @playwright/test ^1.58.2 to devDependencies for
  end-to-end testing support

bun.lock:
- Synced lockfile to reflect the new Playwright dependency and
  previously unresolved entries for react-force-graph, sql.js,
  d3, @types/d3, and @types/sql.js that were already in
  package.json but missing from the lockfile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
